subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Beloved hath sent down, that thereby may be kindled the hearts of them that have cast aside their desires and taken hold of that which they were commanded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المحبوب لیشتعل به قلوب الذین نبذوا اهوائهم و اخذوا ما امروا به من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
